div1.entryFree:
Half-faced, 1) showing but half of the face: a h. groat, John I, 94 (having the king's face in profile; with a play upon the word). our h. sun, H6B IV, 1, 98 (half hidden by the clouds).
2) wretched-looking: out upon this h. fellowship, H4A I, 3, 208. this same h. fellow Shadow, H4B III, 2, 283. Quibbling in John I, 94.
